center.name: 中国大陆
center.summary: 中国大陆是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括灰胸竹鸡、黄眉姬鹟，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The bird is native to eastern mainland China, and has been introduced successfully to Japan, Hawaii and Argentina.Long, John L

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is native to the East Palearctic, from Sakhalin to the north, through Japan across through Korea, mainland China, and Taiwan, wintering in southeast Asia, including the Philippines, Vietnam and Borneo
